string 2:
We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

These guys are "Searching for Nanimon"! And they hail from
some unknown Digital World!
C'mon, can't we call it quits already? Seriously...
Nanimon... is my friend... We'll be together... forever...
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

The strength of their shells is only matched by that of
their resolve! It's the "Kings of Big Bad Bugs"!

Look at my carapace! Look, I say! See just how hard and
tough it is?!

Don't say "carapace"! Just say "shell" like everyone else does!
Who are you trying to kid, using "buzz" words like that?
Eh? "Kid"? Who are ya callin' a kid? I ain't no kid.
Just shut up.
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

"Monzaemon and Friends" are here! They sure do look
familiar, but I'll be damned if I can remember 'em!

Hey, got any of that good stuff on you? You know...
That sticky, gooey, golden, yummy, sweet stuff.

I cannot wait... I wish to fly! I wish to jump! I wish to
hop up and down!
Hahaha... I suppose this is simply who we are as Digimon...
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

He burns so fierce that he engulfs all in his path! The
Paradise Colosseum's watchman makes his fiery return!

My hundredth victim... This calls for a celebration. Heh.
I'm always eager to add to my collection.
Eh? Who're you?!

Hmm. You kinda look like... Could you be relatives, maybe?
You know, the one living in Central Town...?

Wait. I thought you died from an ingrown toenail... Eh? No
way! Does this mean... you're a ghost?!
Aaaaaaagh! You're starting to scare me! For real!
Please, just die already! I've had enough of this!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

There are no lies to be told here... Okay, that was a lie!
Yep, somebody's definitely lying right now!
Whale, I know Puppetmon is telling the truth!
Lillymon never ever lies!
I've never seen either Whamon or Puppetmon lie.
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

3.8 billion YEN in debt! The circus "No Misreckoning" has
brought in a heavy hitter to get them back in the black!

The circus has been tricked! Absolutely swindled!
We're talking some serious sums, here!
Are these the ones who took your money?!

Haha! Yes, that's correct... I-I look forward to your
assistance. Hahahaha!

I'm not sure how I feel about this... Aren't you supposed
to be our esteemed ringleader?
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

Coincidence? Or strategy? They had one bye after another!
Are they any good? Who knows? That's quite a smell, though!
I'm getting tired of everyone refusing to fight us!
I'm ready to give this fight everything I've got!

Whether it's a lucky win or just a bye, it's still a
victory earned through blood, sweat and tears!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

And in this corner! The Androids that guard the Royal Base,
boasting amazing stamina and combat ability!

They're the best of the best, ranking in the top 0.08% of their
kind! These elite Vespamon have the codename "Tiger"!

Wielding the twin blades "Royal Meister", they pierce through
their foes with their special move, Mach Stinger V!
It's the Covert Honey Corps: Royal Commandos!
Tiger!
Tiger?
Tigerrrrrrr!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

Meet the Holy Knight who saved the Ancient Digital World!
Its Omni Blade initializes all in its path! Or so they say.
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

Behold! The twin gatekeepers are here! You may rest at
ease, for Apollomon and Dianamon's conflict has ended!
I'm the child of brilliant lightning!
I'm the child of hard-hearted ice!

Lightning and ice! When our mighty powers join together...
Lightning and ice! With our combined power...

Hey! You screwed it up! It's supposed to be "With our
combined power...", you dolt!
Yeah, that's what I said!

No. No, it's not! Where in the hell did you get "When our
mighty powers join together..." anyway?!

That's not what I said! What are you talking about?! I said
it perfectly!

Nope! You weren't even close! You said "When our mighty
powers join together..." with that dumb look on your face.
Enough! I'm getting tired of all this!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

Eh?! What's this?! What're you doing here?! It's Titamon,
everybody!

It has been a while, kid! I am rather busy, though, so
let's hurry up and finish this thing, already!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

What happened to SuperStarmon this time...? Wait. There's a
true royal ruler now! The ever-brilliant Pharaohmon!
As prince, I hereby give my all for the mighty Pharaohmon!

Here be the king of kings! I fight for the sake of the
all-powerful Pharaohmon!

Now, obey my orders and give me your best. You two are my
most faithful retainers, Prince and King.
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

Ah, such mystery... Such majesty... I feel a refreshing
calm, but why can't I stop crying?!

Yes, an endearing figure, kind to all, with mighty wings
and incredible power...

...the benevolent Lucemon! Worship Lucemon and you will be
offered salvation.

Yes, it is only natural for everyone to venerate such a
divine presence.

I, too, wish to bury my head within Lucemon's wings. In
fact, I am already feeling a little short of breath...
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

Wait a second! It looks like they're already going at it!
What in the world could they be arguing about now?!

Violence is abhorrent! Furthermore, killing is even worse!
Absolutely, positively unacceptable!

That is the very height of delusion! For is this not a
story that can only be resolved through violence?!

Violence is bad! Killing is bad, too! Worst of all, you
must not try to climb the wall!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

The Angel of Virtue, Great Angel, and High Angel have
descended upon us from the Guardian Palace!

How could you lose to someone like this? It is only human,
after all. I am seriously starting to worry, ClavisAngemon.

Hold your tongue! You are talking to the Angel of Virtue,
who just happens to be fond of sleep! Right, ClavisAngemon?

I am not exactly sure why, but both of your words are
hurting me deeply. I ask that the two of you remain silent.
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

These three are inseparable! Watch out, though! They're
cute but deadly! It's the "Terrier Twins and Their Teacher"!

No way! It's them again! I can't believe it. Well, it makes
absolutely no sense, but I guess it's pretty hilarious!

Forget that. My face is absolutely melting off here. Can't
we just go home, already?

All right, which of you is trying to back out of this? It
is not like you two are doing anything until Friday, anyway!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The almighty champions make their triumphant return
to the Paradise Colosseum!

A Royal Knight is joining the battle! Just what are we
about to bear witness to, here?!

Well, I'm here, as promised! Let's see how ya like these
iron fists o' mine!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

Who's the strongest competitor in the Paradise Colosseum?
These destined rivals are about to find out!

Yer cheers are enough to shake the very earth and heavens
themselves! It's the one ya can't wait to see: Marsmon!

The crowd seems to be enjoying itself! Now it's time for me
to join in on the fun!

Are you having fun, too? If so, then I think everyone's
come to the right place!
Now, then. What do you say we have even more fun?!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

This team has their work cut out for them! What feats will
we witness from their display of fighting spirit?!

This group's growing increasingly popular with the fans!
The "Master & Pupil Trio" is here to continue their training!

I've never had this much fun training before! If you want
to stop my masters and me, you'll have to beat us first!

We only listen to those whom we deem worthy. We will see if
you are someone we should listen to.

Someone trusted by Kunlun themself! How interesting!
I wish to see your strength for myself!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The only one who stands a chance of beating this next
opponent... is our mighty champion!

The great hero of Shambala is joining the battle!
Hopefully, the arena can withstand this clash of greats!

I have come from Shambala and fought against the heroes of
Iliad in this very arena.

However, I can tell that you are not like the others.
Indeed, I wonder just who or what you are...

No, let us continue this discussion with our fists. I am
Susanomon! Come! Face me if you dare!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

It's impossible to get a read on this one! Watch as its
smoldering spirit readies for battle!

This figure's so strikingly bright, it's hard to keep my
eyes open! Still, I'll gladly squint to see this battle!

Thank you for accepting my challenge. Ah, my heart sings
with anticipation of our clash!

It has been some time since a battle has excited me thus.
Come and show me this strength that felled Grademon!

Ah, please allow me to properly introduce myself. My name
is LordKnightmon. Now, let us begin!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

Will our champion manage to seize the title of "the
Twentiest"?!

Walking the path of twenty, it's the True Twentiest! In
fact, it's the Twentiest of all Twentiests!

Ah, I see that you, too, wish to walk the path of the
Twentiest!
Very well. I shall respect your wishes.

Allow me to show you what I have attained at the very
summit of the Twentiest!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The aura of a champion is without equal! In fact, it's even
a match for these opponents' golden sheen!

This golden duo labels itself as supporters of justice and
wishes to prove its strength to the champion!

While we do wish to prove our strength, nothing makes us
happier than simply facing you in battle!

However, it is not enough that only we enjoy this encounter.
You must do so as well. Therefore, we shall give it our all!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

We've got some newcomers here! Let's see what these rookies
can do in their maiden battle!
Please welcome the tag team of Chuumon and PlatinumSukamon!

Ya must've drawn the short straw to get us as yer first
opponents! Try to keep up!
Hahahaha!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the Rookie Team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

Was the last bout simply a fluke?! It's the rookies' second
match! Another win and we'll be looking at the real deal!

It's three Phantomon! Whatever ya do, don't let 'em possess
ya!
I see you...
I hear you...
I smell you...
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the Rookie Team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

These surprising rookies have shown incredible strength and
resilience! Get ready to be amazed by this next battle!

It's the legendary Taomon! And she's brought along Crowmon
for the bout as well!

Darkness lies just a step ahead... Three steps, and you
will be basking in my light.
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the Rookie Team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

Win this and yer ready to take on the champion! Come on,
now, rookies! Show us ya got what it takes!

Don't turn away from their dazzling brilliance! Behold!
The KINGS! OF! CELEBRITY!
I am prince of all who stand before me!
No! They all look to me as their one true shining star!
You are both wrong! For I am the king of everything!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the Rookie Team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

This is the moment we've all been waiting for!
These mighty rookies' first real challenge!

Our inaugural champion has never been beaten!
Another win today will keep that streak intact!
I'm not losing to anyone. Not until I surpass Big Bro...!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the Rookie Team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

Amazing! It's the first appearance of the champion from the
Material World! How will the SDGP Champ hold up?!

It's a bloodsucker's ball! Behold the aloof noble!
Wait... they're being joined by Minotarumon!

Hehehe... Shall we dance?
I am going to enjoy this.

Where can I find a glass of nice, tasty milk?
I wanna drink some. Got any?

Hm? What are you doing, Minotarumon?! I thought I told you
not to follow me! Who brought you here?!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the SDGP Champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

At last, the SDGP Champ is here!
Get ready to be amazed!

It's the "Circus in the Red: No Misreckoning"!
They've joined the fight in order to help pay off their debts!

*whispering* Please lose this battle.
I have a wife and kids to think of...

Hm, glurp? Ringleader, when did you get a family, glurp?
You've been single as long as I've known you, glurp...
You idiot! You're ruining everything!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the SDGP Champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

Without further ado, we welcome the Shinjuku Dungeon
Grand Prix Champion! A fighter truly worthy of the title!

He burns so fierce that it makes you forget the past!
The Paradise Colosseum's watchman makes his fiery appearance!

My hundredth victim... This calls for a celebration.
Heh. I'm always eager to add to my list.

Eh? Or is it 101? My last one was 100? Wait.
Maybe it was 98? Or 103? I've lost count already.

Never mind. Hehe... It doesn't matter how many.
I'll just be happy to get another trophy for my wall!
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the SDGP Champion team!

We've kept you waiting long enough!
The fighters will now enter the arena!

The Shinjuku Dungeon Grand Prix Champion has finally come
all this way! Which side will seize control of Group A?!

This dynamic duo hates oolong tea!
It's cuteness to the max, the "Terrier Twins"!

I'm lowkey starving like a minute ago!
Like, let's go grab an EbiBurger after this?

I totes broke a nail in the last match...
That's like, -1000 aura...
Aaand now... let's get this match OOOOON!
The winner is... the SDGP Champion team!
